[@vrsim/earth-engine-ol](../globals.md) / degToRad

# Function: degToRad()

> **degToRad**(`degrees`): `number`

Defined in: [src/utils/math.ts:46](https://github.com/gkc3578984995/openlayerengine/blob/fbb909494fe07835405da572510365d128c1e5a0/src/utils/math.ts#L46)

将角度换算为弧度。

## Parameters

### degrees

`number`

待换算的角度值。

## Returns

`number`

对应的弧度。

## Example

```ts
import { degToRad } from '@vrsim/earth-engine-ol';

const radians = degToRad(180);
```
